core_offer: Branded resale platform that turns old stock, returns and pre-owned into revenue for fashion brands
products: Branded P2P resale storefront — built and configured for each brand
Delivery/logistics — cross-border delivery flows across 20+ European countries
Payments — store credits, payouts, multi-currency support
target_audience: Fashion brands (e-commerce) that want to monetize returns, old stock, and pre-owned items
value_proposition: Monetize returns and old stock without extra workload, launch in 2 weeks
pricing_model: Platform fee on resale GMV (ROI calculator on site)
